requested_items.objective: Evaluate the first practical decoder-style proxy to determine whether KV-context score pressure changes the scheduler or softmax bottleneck picture.

expected_result.reason: Practical proxy evidence should decide whether to pursue scheduler/KV-context work, continue toward dataset-backed decoder execution, or reconsider softmax datapath proposals.
